caption: The video features a close-up of a stack of colorful papers, with a prominent yellow paper in the foreground and other papers in various shades like blue and orange slightly blurred in the background. The focus remains on the yellow paper throughout the sequence, suggesting it is the main subject. A caption appears at the bottom of the screen, reading, "This is the first and the last thing we should give to people who have lost everything." This text implies a reflective or emotional context, possibly related to support or aid for individuals facing significant loss. The static nature of the shot and the emphasis on the text suggest that the video aims to convey a message of empathy and assistance.
